annotations.note: Nice — guarding the empty name avoids rendering "Hello !".
Consider sourcing VERSION from package.json so it can't drift out of sync.

general.text: 👋 This is a **sample task** so a fresh clone isn't empty. Click the three tabs above — **Log** (an interactive page), **Code Review** (this diff), **QA Plan** — open a 💬 on any diff line, or select text on the Log page to leave a comment. Delete this `reviews/sample/` directory once you've got your own.

src/greet.js#0.text: Good catch — `name.trim()` would also fix `"Hello   !"`. Worth a follow-up; the empty-guard here is the important fix, so I'd ship this and trim separately.

log:welcome.text: This thread is anchored to a section of the **Log** page (a `log:` target the page chose). A separate Claude Code "reviewer" session answers here — try asking it something.
